features.name: /clear
features.summary_ja: 会話履歴をクリアして新しい状態から始める
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションの会話履歴をクリア。メモリ（永続化された情報）は保持される。長時間のセッションで文脈をリセットしたい時に使う。
features.summary_en: Clear the current session's conversation history to start fresh on a new task while keeping all persistent memory intact.
features.description_en: Clears the conversation history of the current session, resetting the context window to zero turns. Persistent memory — information saved across sessions — is preserved and is not affected by this command. Use it when a long session has accumulated too much unrelated context and you want to start clean without ending the session entirely.

features.name: /help
features.summary_ja: 利用可能なコマンド一覧を表示
features.description_ja: Claude Code で使える組み込みコマンドの一覧を表示。困ったらまずこれ。
features.summary_en: Show a quick-reference list of all available built-in Claude Code slash commands, keyboard shortcuts, and common operations.
features.description_en: Shows a comprehensive list of all built-in commands available in Claude Code. When you are unsure what commands exist or how to invoke a feature, run this first. The output includes slash commands, keyboard shortcuts, and brief descriptions so you can quickly find the right tool without leaving the session.

features.name: /memory
features.summary_ja: メモリーシステムを管理
features.description_ja: ユーザーの好み、プロジェクトの背景、フィードバックなどを永続的に蓄積するメモリーシステムを管理。将来の対話で自動的に参照される。
features.summary_en: View and manage the persistent memory system that stores user preferences, project context, and feedback across all sessions.
features.description_en: Manages the persistent memory system that accumulates user preferences, project background information, and session feedback. Stored memories are automatically referenced in future interactions to personalize Claude's responses. Use this command to review what has been saved, add new entries, or remove outdated information that no longer reflects your current workflow.

features.name: /agents
features.summary_ja: サブエージェントを管理
features.description_ja: サブエージェントの定義・起動・状態確認。複雑なタスクを並列実行する際に使う。Task tool と組み合わせる。
features.summary_en: Define, launch, and monitor sub-agents that run tasks in parallel using isolated execution contexts separate from the main session.
features.description_en: Manages sub-agent definitions, launches new agents, and checks their current status. Sub-agents run in isolated execution contexts separate from the main session, making them ideal for parallel or context-sensitive tasks. Combine with the Task tool to delegate complex workloads. This command lets you see which agents are active and inspect their progress without interrupting the main conversation.

features.name: /context
features.summary_ja: コンテキストウィンドウ使用率を表示
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションでのコンテキスト使用率を確認。長時間セッションでの圧縮タイミング判断に役立つ。
features.summary_en: Show the current session's context window usage as a percentage to help you decide when to run /compact.
features.description_en: Shows the context window usage rate for the active session as a percentage of the total available context. Long sessions accumulate conversation turns and file reads that gradually fill the context window. Monitoring this metric helps you decide when to run /compact to summarize and compress older turns before the window fills up and forces an automatic compaction.

features.name: /hooks
features.summary_ja: フック設定を管理
features.description_ja: PreToolUse/PostToolUse/Stop等のイベントで自動実行するシェルスクリプトを設定。
features.summary_en: Set up shell scripts to run automatically on lifecycle events like PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, and other hook points.
features.description_en: Sets up shell scripts that execute automatically on Claude Code lifecycle events such as PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, SubagentStop, SessionStart, SessionEnd, UserPromptSubmit, PreCompact, and Notification. Use the interactive interface to add, edit, or remove hook definitions without manually editing settings.json. Hooks are a powerful way to enforce policies, automate formatting, send notifications, or inject context into every interaction.

features.name: /init
features.summary_ja: CLAUDE.md を初期化
features.description_ja: 現在のリポジトリを分析して CLAUDE.md（プロジェクトガイダンスファイル）の雛形を生成。
features.summary_en: Analyze the current repository structure and generate a CLAUDE.md project guidance file template to customize for your team.
features.description_en: Analyzes the current repository structure — including directory layout, language, framework, and common patterns — and generates a starter CLAUDE.md file that provides project-specific guidance to Claude. The generated template includes placeholders for coding conventions, important directories, and team-specific notes. Edit the file after generation to add details that Claude will read automatically at the start of every future session.

features.name: /review
features.summary_ja: プルリクエストをレビュー
features.description_ja: 現在のブランチまたは指定PRをレビュー。コード品質、バグ可能性、改善提案を返す。
features.summary_en: Review the current branch or a specified pull request for code quality, potential bugs, and specific improvement suggestions.
features.description_en: Reviews the current branch or a specified pull request and returns structured feedback covering code quality, potential bugs, and concrete improvement suggestions. Run it without arguments to review the current branch diff, or pass a PR number or URL to review a specific pull request. The output is formatted to make it easy to act on individual recommendations.

features.name: /config
features.summary_ja: 設定を表示・変更
features.description_ja: テーマ、モデル、その他のユーザー設定を変更。settings.json の代替インタフェース。
features.summary_en: Open the interactive settings interface to view and change the theme, active model, and other user preferences.
features.description_en: Opens the interactive configuration interface where you can change the active theme, model selection, and other user-level preferences stored in settings.json. Use this as a menu-driven alternative to editing the JSON file directly. Changes take effect immediately in the current session without requiring a restart.

features.name: /model
features.summary_ja: 使用するモデルを切り替え
features.description_ja: Opus / Sonnet / Haiku など、現在のセッションで使用するモデルを切り替える。
features.summary_en: Switch the AI model used in the current session to Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, or any other model available on your plan.
features.description_en: Switches the AI model used for the current session. Available options include Claude Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, and other models depending on your subscription plan. Switching models does not reset the conversation history, so you can change to a faster or more capable model mid-session as your needs change without losing context.

features.name: /status
features.summary_ja: セッション状態を表示
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションの統計情報（モデル、ディレクトリ、git状態など）を表示。
features.summary_en: Display current session statistics including the active model, working directory path, git branch, and other session metadata.
features.description_en: Shows a summary of the current session's statistics, including the active model, working directory path, git repository and branch, context usage, and other metadata. Run this to get a quick overview of the session environment, confirm which model is active, or verify the working directory is set correctly before starting a complex task.

features.name: /cost
features.summary_ja: API利用コストを表示
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションでのAPIトークン使用量とコストを確認。
features.summary_en: Show the total API token usage count and estimated monetary cost incurred so far in the current session.
features.description_en: Shows the total number of API tokens consumed and the estimated monetary cost for the current session. Use this to keep track of spending during long or intensive sessions. The breakdown includes input and output tokens separately so you can understand what is driving usage. For historical data across multiple sessions, see /usage or /stats.

features.name: /compact
features.summary_ja: コンテキストを強制圧縮
features.description_ja: コンテキストが膨らんだとき、過去の会話を要約して圧縮。重要な情報は保持。
features.summary_en: Force-compress the conversation context by summarizing past turns into a condensed form while retaining the most critical information.
features.description_en: Compresses the context window when it has grown large by summarizing past conversation turns into a condensed form. The most important information — file contents, decisions, and task state — is retained in the summary, while verbose exchange history is removed. Run this proactively when /context shows high usage, or Claude will trigger it automatically when the window approaches its limit.

features.name: /resume
features.summary_ja: 前回のセッションを再開
features.description_ja: 終了したセッションを再開して続きから作業を再開。
features.summary_en: Resume a previously ended session and continue working from exactly where you left off with all context and history restored.
features.description_en: Resumes a previously ended session so you can continue working from exactly where you stopped. The entire conversation history and session state are restored. Use this after accidentally closing Claude Code or when you want to return to a task the next day. For the most recent session, the CLI --continue flag is faster. For a specific older session, see also the --resume CLI flag.

features.name: /security-review
features.summary_ja: セキュリティレビューを実施
features.description_ja: 現在のブランチの変更内容に対してセキュリティ観点のレビューを実行。
features.summary_en: Run a security-focused code review of the current branch's changes to find vulnerabilities, insecure patterns, and attack vectors.
features.description_en: Performs a dedicated security review of the changes on the current branch, looking specifically for vulnerabilities, insecure coding patterns, injection risks, authentication weaknesses, and other security concerns. The output is structured around specific findings with references to the affected code, making it actionable for addressing issues before merging.

features.name: /plugin
features.summary_ja: プラグインを管理
features.description_ja: プラグインのインストール・アンインストール・更新・一覧表示・エラー確認を行う。Marketplace からのインストールや --plugin-dir で読み込んだプラグインの管理に使う。
features.summary_en: Install, uninstall, update, list, and troubleshoot plugins from the official Marketplace or a configured local plugin directory.
features.description_en: Manages the full lifecycle of Claude Code plugins: installation, uninstallation, updates, listing installed plugins, and viewing error details for plugins that failed to load. Install from the official Plugin Marketplace or from a local directory configured with --plugin-dir. Use the error view to diagnose why a plugin is disabled or failing to initialize.

features.name: /skills
features.summary_ja: 利用可能なスキルを一覧・検索
features.description_ja: インストール済みのスキルを一覧表示。テキスト入力でフィルタリング可能。スキルを選択するとプロンプトに `/skill-name` が補完される。
features.summary_en: List and search all installed skills; selecting one autocompletes its slash command name directly into the prompt input field.
features.description_en: Displays a filterable list of all installed skills currently available in the session. Type characters to filter the list by name or keyword. Selecting a skill from the list autocompletes its /skill-name into the prompt input so you can invoke it immediately. Use this when you cannot remember the exact name of a skill you have installed.

features.name: /mcp
features.summary_ja: MCPサーバーの接続状態を確認
features.description_ja: 接続中の MCP サーバー一覧・ツール数・認証状態を表示。0ツールのサーバーはフラグ表示される。重複URLサーバーの警告も表示。
features.summary_en: Check the connection status, registered tool count, and authentication state of all currently connected MCP servers in the session.
features.description_en: Displays a list of all currently connected MCP servers along with each server's tool count and authentication state. Servers that expose zero tools are flagged for easy identification. Duplicate URL warnings are shown when multiple servers point to the same endpoint. Use this to verify that MCP integrations are connected and providing the tools you expect.

features.name: /doctor
features.summary_ja: 環境の診断・問題チェック
features.description_ja: MCP サーバーのエラー、無効化されたプラグインの警告、バージョン競合などの問題を診断して表示。トラブルシュートの第一歩。
features.summary_en: Diagnose environment problems such as MCP server errors, disabled plugins, version conflicts, and other configuration issues affecting Claude Code.
features.description_en: Diagnoses and reports a range of environment problems including MCP server startup errors, disabled or incompatible plugins, version conflicts between Claude Code and installed extensions, and other configuration issues. Run this as the first step when something unexpected is happening — it provides a structured summary of detected problems and suggested remediation steps.

features.name: /usage
features.summary_ja: トークン使用量とコストを確認
features.description_ja: 現在セッションおよび過去の API トークン使用量・コストを表示。/cost と /stats のタブも /usage 内から開ける（v2.1.118 で統合）。
features.summary_en: View current and historical API token usage and associated costs in a unified interface with tabs for stats and history.
features.description_en: Displays current session and historical API token usage alongside associated monetary costs, all in one unified interface. Since v2.1.118, this command integrates the functionality of /cost and /stats as tabs within the same view. Use the Cost tab for per-session breakdowns and the Stats tab for long-term usage trends and model preference data.

features.name: /effort
features.summary_ja: Thinking の処理強度を調整
features.description_ja: Claude の思考量（effort）を low / normal / high / max / auto から選択。Opus モデルの xhigh も設定可能。速度と精度のトレードオフを制御。
features.summary_en: Adjust Claude's thinking intensity level between low, normal, high, max, and auto to balance speed against accuracy and cost.
features.description_en: Selects Claude's thinking effort level from the options: low, normal, high, max, or auto. The xhigh setting is also available for Opus models when deeper reasoning is required. Lower effort levels respond faster and use fewer tokens, while higher levels produce more thorough analysis. Auto lets Claude decide the appropriate depth based on the complexity of the task.

features.name: /rename
features.summary_ja: セッションに名前をつける
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションにわかりやすい名前を付ける。ステータスバーに表示され、/resume での再開時に識別しやすくなる。
features.summary_en: Assign a human-readable name to the current session to make it easier to identify when resuming it later.
features.description_en: Assigns a human-readable name to the current session. The name appears in the status bar for the duration of the session and is shown in the session picker when using /resume. Use this when working on multiple sessions simultaneously or to make a session easily identifiable when you want to return to it later.

features.name: /login
features.summary_ja: OAuth 認証を再実行
features.description_ja: トークン期限切れ・認証エラー時に OAuth ログインを再実行。CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN 環境変数が設定されていてもディスク認証に切り替えられる。
features.summary_en: Re-run the OAuth login flow when your access token expires or an authentication error occurs during an active session.
features.description_en: Re-runs the OAuth login flow to refresh authentication when your token has expired or an authentication error has occurred. This works even if the CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN environment variable is set — running /login switches to disk-based authentication so you can continue the session with fresh credentials without restarting.

features.name: /permissions
features.summary_ja: 許可・拒否されたコマンドを管理
features.description_ja: Auto モードで拒否されたコマンドの履歴を確認・リトライ。許可ルールの追加・削除も可能。Recent タブで直近の許可状況を確認。
features.summary_en: Review commands allowed or denied in Auto mode, retry denied operations, and add or remove permission allowlist entries.
features.description_en: Shows the history of tool calls and commands that were denied during Auto mode operation, and lets you retry specific denied operations after reviewing them. The Recent tab shows the current state of permission allowances. Use this to adjust permission rules, add new allowlist entries for safe operations, or remove entries that are no longer needed.

features.name: /add-dir
features.summary_ja: 作業ディレクトリを追加
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションに追加のディレクトリを読み込む。--remember オプションで永続化可能。複数リポジトリにまたがる作業に便利。
features.summary_en: Add an additional working directory to the current session to expand Claude's file access, with an option to persist it.
features.description_en: Loads an additional directory into the current session, expanding Claude's file access beyond the current working directory. Use the --remember option to persist the additional directory across future sessions. Particularly useful when working across multiple repositories or when files you need are located outside the primary working directory.

features.name: /branch
features.summary_ja: セッションをブランチ（分岐）する
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションをフォークして別の方向を試す。分岐したセッションは /resume で再開可能。実験的な変更を本流に影響させずに試すのに使う。
features.summary_en: Fork the current session into an independent branch to safely try a different approach without affecting the original conversation.
features.description_en: Forks the current session at the current point so you can explore a different approach or direction. The branched session is independent from the original and can be resumed later with /resume. Use this for experimental changes you want to test without affecting the main session, similar to creating a git branch for a speculative feature.

features.name: /copy
features.summary_ja: 最後の応答をクリップボードにコピー
features.description_ja: Claude の直前の応答をクリップボードにコピー。マークダウン形式で GitHub・Notion・Slack に貼り付けるのに最適。tmux 環境でも動作（/terminal-setup 要設定）。
features.summary_en: Copy Claude's most recent response to the clipboard in Markdown format, ready to paste into GitHub, Notion, or Slack.
features.description_en: Copies Claude's most recent response to the clipboard in Markdown format, making it immediately ready to paste into GitHub issues, Notion pages, Slack messages, or any other tool that renders Markdown. Works in standard terminal environments and in tmux sessions when properly configured with /terminal-setup.

features.name: /remote-control
features.summary_ja: ブラウザ・スマホからセッションを継続
features.description_ja: CLI セッションを claude.ai/code に接続し、ブラウザやスマートフォンから作業を引き継げる。Remote Control 接続中はセッションカラーも同期される。
features.summary_en: Connect the active CLI session to claude.ai/code so you can continue the same session from a browser or smartphone.
features.description_en: Connects the current CLI session to claude.ai/code, allowing you to continue the same session from a web browser or smartphone without losing any context. When a Remote Control connection is active, the session accent color set with /color is synchronized between the CLI and the web interface.

features.name: /terminal-setup
features.summary_ja: ターミナル環境を最適化
features.description_ja: Claude Code が最適動作するようターミナルを設定。iTerm2 のクリップボードアクセス許可・スクロール感度調整などを自動設定する。
features.summary_en: Optimize Claude Code terminal settings including iTerm2 clipboard access permissions and mouse scroll sensitivity adjustments.
features.description_en: Configures the terminal environment for optimal Claude Code operation. Automatically sets up iTerm2 clipboard access permissions so that /copy works correctly, adjusts mouse scroll sensitivity, and applies other terminal-level settings that improve the Claude Code experience. Run this once when setting up a new machine or if clipboard or scroll behavior is not working as expected.

features.name: /reload-plugins
features.summary_ja: プラグインをリロード
features.description_ja: インストール済みプラグインを再読み込み。プラグインを編集・更新した後に変更を即反映させる。依存パッケージの自動インストールも行う。
features.summary_en: Reload all installed plugins immediately after editing or updating them to apply changes without restarting the Claude Code session.
features.description_en: Reloads all installed plugins so that edits and updates take effect immediately in the current session. Also automatically installs any missing dependency packages required by the plugins. Use this after modifying a plugin's SKILL.md or after installing a plugin update to pick up the new behavior without ending and restarting the session.

features.name: /color
features.summary_ja: セッションのアクセントカラーを設定
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションのUI色を変更。引数なしで実行するとランダムに選択。Remote Control 接続時は claude.ai/code にも同期される。
features.summary_en: Set the current session's UI accent color; run without arguments to randomly pick a color from the available palette.
features.description_en: Changes the UI accent color for the current session from the available color palette. Running the command without arguments selects a color randomly. You can also pass a specific color name as an argument. When connected via Remote Control, the chosen color is synchronized to the claude.ai/code interface as well.

features.name: /loop
features.summary_ja: プロンプトを定期実行スケジュール
features.description_ja: 指定した間隔でプロンプトやスラッシュコマンドを繰り返し実行。/loop 5m デプロイ確認 のように使う。Esc でキャンセル可能。`/proactive` はエイリアス（v2.1.105）。Bedrock/Vertex でも利用可。

examples.title: Check deploy every 5 minutes
examples.code: /loop 5m デプロイ状態を確認して

features.summary_en: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval; cancel anytime with Esc. Also available as /proactive.
features.description_en: Repeatedly executes a prompt or slash command at a specified interval. For example, `/loop 5m check deploy status` runs the check every five minutes until you press Esc to cancel. Use it for monitoring tasks, periodic status checks, or any work you want to run on a schedule during an interactive session. The alias /proactive was introduced in v2.1.105. Also works on Bedrock and Vertex.

features.name: /theme
features.summary_ja: UIテーマを切り替え・カスタマイズ
features.description_ja: テーマピッカーを開きビルトインテーマを選択、または ~/.claude/themes/ のJSONファイルで独自テーマを作成。Auto(match terminal)でダーク/ライト自動切替も可。Ctrl+t でシンタックスハイライトをON/OFF。
features.summary_en: Switch the UI theme using built-in presets or custom JSON theme files stored in your ~/.claude/themes/ directory.
features.description_en: Opens the interactive theme picker to select a built-in theme from the available presets. Custom themes can be created by placing JSON theme files in ~/.claude/themes/ and selecting them from the same picker. Choose Auto (match terminal) to automatically switch between dark and light variants based on the terminal's current color scheme. Press Ctrl+t to toggle syntax highlighting on or off independently of the active theme.

features.name: /stats
features.summary_ja: APIトークン使用統計を表示
features.description_ja: お気に入りモデル・使用量グラフ・使用ストリーク等の詳細統計を表示。v2.1.118 以降は /usage の Stats タブへのショートカットとして動作。r キーで Last 7 days / Last 30 days / All time を切替。
features.summary_en: View detailed API token usage statistics including favorite model breakdowns, usage graphs, and streak tracking across all sessions.
features.description_en: Displays detailed usage statistics including your most frequently used models, token usage graphs over time, and usage streak information. Since v2.1.118 this command acts as a shortcut to the Stats tab within /usage. Press r to toggle between Last 7 days, Last 30 days, and All time views to analyze usage trends across different time ranges.

features.name: /feedback
features.summary_ja: フィードバックをAnthropicに送信
features.description_ja: バグ報告・機能要望をAnthropicに直接送信し、GitHub issue URL も生成。認証状態によって利用不可の場合はメニューにその旨が表示される。長い説明文も正しく処理される（v2.1.14 修正済）。
features.summary_en: Send a bug report or feature request directly to Anthropic and simultaneously generate a GitHub issue URL for tracking.
features.description_en: Sends bug reports and feature requests directly to Anthropic and simultaneously generates a corresponding GitHub issue URL so you can track the report. The command handles long descriptions correctly (fixed in v2.1.14). If feedback submission is not available in the current authentication state, a notice is displayed in the menu instead of showing a broken form.

features.name: /voice
features.summary_ja: 音声入力（ボイスモード）を切替
features.description_ja: 音声でプロンプトを入力するボイスモードをON/OFF。有効化時に認識言語を表示し、未対応言語は警告。Remote Control セッションでも動作。認証プランによっては非表示になる。
features.summary_en: Toggle voice input mode on or off to speak prompts instead of typing them in the terminal interface.
features.description_en: Toggles voice input mode on and off, enabling you to speak your prompts using a microphone instead of typing them. When enabled, the recognized language is displayed. Languages not supported by the voice recognition engine show a warning. Voice mode also works in Remote Control sessions. The command may be hidden depending on the authentication plan in use.

features.name: /tui
features.summary_ja: フリッカーフリーなフルスクリーンレンダラーに切替
features.description_ja: /tui fullscreen で代替レンダラーに切り替える。フリッカーなし・低メモリ使用量・マウスサポート・選択時の自動コピーを備える。worktree内セッションでも利用可能。
features.summary_en: Switch to the alternative flicker-free fullscreen TUI renderer with mouse support and automatic clipboard copy on text selection.
features.description_en: Switches to an alternative fullscreen terminal renderer via /tui fullscreen. This renderer offers flicker-free rendering, lower memory usage compared to the default renderer, mouse click and scroll support, and automatic clipboard copy when text is selected. The fullscreen renderer is also available inside worktree sessions.

features.name: /extra-usage
features.summary_ja: 追加API利用を有効化するダイアログを開く
features.description_ja: プランの使用量上限を超えた追加API利用を有効化する。有効化後は /fast が即座に使用可能になる。VS Code および Remote Control（ブラウザ・スマホ）からも利用可能。
features.summary_en: Open a dialog to enable additional API usage beyond your plan's monthly limit so /fast becomes immediately available.
features.description_en: Opens a dialog that lets you enable additional API usage beyond your plan's standard monthly limit. Once enabled, features like /fast become immediately available without waiting for the next billing cycle. The dialog is accessible from VS Code and Remote Control (browser and smartphone) sessions as well as the standard CLI.

features.name: /rewind
features.summary_ja: 会話を巻き戻してコード変更を取り消す
features.description_ja: ピッカーで任意のポイントを選択して会話を巻き戻し、コード変更も元に戻せる。/undo はエイリアス。VS Code では Esc×2 でも起動可能。
features.summary_en: Open a picker to rewind the conversation to any selected earlier point and undo all code changes made since then.
features.description_en: Opens an interactive picker that lets you select any earlier turn in the conversation history as a rewind point. After selecting a turn, the conversation is rolled back to that point and all code changes made since then are undone. The alias /undo does the same thing. In VS Code, pressing Esc twice also opens the rewind picker.

features.name: /upgrade
features.summary_ja: Claude Maxプランへスムーズにアップグレード
features.description_ja: Claude Max プランへの切り替えダイアログを開く。現在の認証設定で利用できない場合は自動的に非表示になる。レート制限時にサジェストされる場合がある。
features.summary_en: Open the Claude Max plan upgrade dialog to smoothly switch to a higher subscription tier with more generous limits.
features.description_en: Opens an in-session dialog for upgrading to the Claude Max plan, which provides higher rate limits and access to additional features. The dialog is automatically hidden when it is not applicable to the current authentication configuration. Claude Code may suggest this command when you are rate-limited on your current plan.

features.name: /exit
features.summary_ja: セッションを終了してアーカイブ
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションを終了しアーカイブする。Remote Control（ブラウザ・スマホ）からも実行可能。終了時にセッションが確実に保存される。
features.summary_en: End the current session and reliably archive it, ensuring all conversation data and tool logs are saved before closing.
features.description_en: Ends the current session and archives it, ensuring all conversation history, tool call logs, and session metadata are saved reliably. Can be executed from Remote Control sessions (browser or smartphone) as well as from the CLI. Use this instead of closing the terminal abruptly to ensure the session is properly archived for later retrieval with /resume.

features.name: /export
features.summary_ja: 会話をファイルにエクスポート
features.description_ja: 現在の会話を外部ファイルに書き出す。絶対パスや ~ も指定可能で、完了後にファイルの全パスを表示。会話の共有や記録保存に使う。
features.summary_en: Export the current conversation transcript to an external file, optionally specifying a custom path for sharing or archiving.
features.description_en: Writes the current conversation transcript to an external file. Accepts absolute paths, paths starting with ~, and relative paths. The full resolved path of the output file is displayed on completion. Use this to share a conversation with a teammate, archive a problem-solving session for documentation, or post it to an issue tracker.

features.name: /ultrareview
features.summary_ja: クラウドで並列マルチエージェントコードレビュー
features.description_ja: クラウド上でマルチエージェントを並列実行し包括的なコードレビューを行う。引数なしで現在ブランチをレビュー、`/ultrareview <PR番号>` でGitHub PRを対象指定。`claude ultrareview` でCIからの非対話実行も可。
features.summary_en: Run a comprehensive cloud-based multi-agent parallel code review on the current branch or a specified GitHub pull request.
features.description_en: Launches multiple specialized review agents in parallel in the cloud to perform a comprehensive, multi-perspective code review. Run without arguments to review the current branch; pass a PR number to target a specific GitHub pull request. Can also be run non-interactively from CI with `claude ultrareview`. The parallel agent architecture covers more ground than a single-pass review.

features.name: /plan
features.summary_ja: プランモードをプロンプトから直接起動
features.description_ja: プランモード（読み取り専用計画モード）をスラッシュコマンドで直接有効化する。説明文を引数に渡すと `/plan 認証バグを修正` のように即座に計画を開始できる。Shift+Tab でも同様に切り替え可能。
features.summary_en: Activate read-only plan mode directly via a slash command, optionally passing an inline task description to start planning immediately.
features.description_en: Enables plan mode — a read-only mode where Claude outlines what it would do without making any actual file changes. Pass a description as an argument (e.g., /plan fix auth bug) to start planning that specific task immediately. Plan mode can also be toggled with Shift+Tab. Use this to review the proposed approach before committing to any changes.

features.name: /tasks
features.summary_ja: バックグラウンドタスクの状態を管理・確認
features.description_ja: バックグラウンドで実行中のタスクの状態を確認・管理するダイアログを開く。タスクが1つのみの場合は直接タスク詳細に遷移する。remote session URL なども確認できる。
features.summary_en: Open a dialog to view and manage the status of all background tasks and their associated remote session URLs.
features.description_en: Opens a management dialog for monitoring background tasks running in the current session. If only one task is active, the dialog navigates directly to the task detail view. Use this to check progress, view remote session URLs, and manage tasks launched by /bg or the Task tool.

features.name: /btw
features.summary_ja: 応答生成中にサイドクエスチョンを割り込ませる
features.description_ja: Claudeが応答を生成中に `/btw 質問` と入力してサイドの質問を差し込める。貼り付けたテキストも含めて処理され、メインの応答を中断せずに別の問いを解決できる。

examples.title: Side question
examples.code: /btw この関数の引数の型は？

features.summary_en: Inject a side question into the conversation by typing /btw followed by the question while Claude is still generating a response.
features.description_en: Lets you type /btw followed by a question while Claude is actively generating a response, inserting the question as a side query without interrupting the main response. Pasted text is also processed correctly. This is useful when a thought occurs to you mid-response and you want it addressed without waiting for Claude to finish its current output.

features.name: /insights
features.summary_ja: セッション履歴からインサイトレポートを生成
features.description_ja: 現在のセッション履歴を分析してインサイトレポートを生成し、レポートファイルへのリンクを返す。ツール呼び出し履歴も含めて処理される。セッションの振り返りや記録保存に使う。
features.summary_en: Analyze the complete session history including all tool calls and generate a structured insights report linked in the transcript.
features.description_en: Analyzes the complete current session history — including every tool call, file read, and conversation turn — and generates a structured insights report. A link to the report file is returned in the transcript. Use this at the end of a long session to create a record of what was explored and decided, or to share a summary of the work done.

features.name: /release-notes
features.summary_ja: Claude Codeのリリースノートを確認
features.description_ja: Claude Code の過去バージョンのリリースノートをインタラクティブなバージョンピッカーで閲覧できる（v2.1.92以降）。最新版から任意バージョンを選択して更新内容を確認。
features.summary_en: Browse Claude Code release notes interactively for any past version using a version picker, available from v2.1.92 onward.
features.description_en: Lets you browse the release notes for any past version of Claude Code using an interactive version picker, introduced in v2.1.92. Select any version from the list to read its full update content. Use this to catch up on changes after an update or to verify when a specific feature was introduced.

features.name: /keybindings
features.summary_ja: カスタムキーバインド設定を開始
features.description_ja: カスタムキーボードショートカットの設定ガイドを表示。コンテキストごとのキーバインド設定・コードシーケンス作成・~/.claude/keybindings.json の編集方法を案内する（v2.1.18で追加）。
features.summary_en: Show the setup guide for creating custom keyboard shortcuts and chord bindings in Claude Code, added in v2.1.18.
features.description_en: Displays a comprehensive setup guide for creating and managing custom keyboard shortcuts in Claude Code, added in v2.1.18. Covers context-specific key bindings, how to create chord sequences (multi-key shortcuts), and instructions for editing the ~/.claude/keybindings.json configuration file. Use this as a starting point when customizing your keyboard workflow.

features.name: /sandbox
features.summary_ja: サンドボックス実行環境を管理
features.description_ja: サンドボックス環境の状態を確認するタブ付きダイアログを表示。Dependencies タブで依存関係のインストール状況と手順を確認できる。Tab/矢印キーでタブ切替が可能。
features.summary_en: View sandbox environment status and check dependency installation progress using a navigable tabbed dialog interface.
features.description_en: Displays a tabbed dialog showing the current status of the sandbox execution environment. The Dependencies tab lists which dependencies have been installed and provides instructions for installing additional ones. Navigate between tabs using the Tab key or arrow keys. Use this when a sandbox command fails due to a missing dependency.

features.name: /claude-api
features.summary_ja: Claude API開発を支援するスキルを起動
features.description_ja: Claude API・Anthropic SDK を使ったアプリ開発を支援するスキル（v2.1.69で追加）。Managed Agents、エージェント設計パターン、ツール設計・コンテキスト管理・キャッシング戦略のガイダンスを提供。
features.summary_en: Launch the built-in skill that provides expert guidance for building applications with the Claude API and Anthropic SDK.
features.description_en: Launches a built-in skill added in v2.1.69 that provides expert guidance for building applications using the Claude API and Anthropic SDK. Covers Managed Agents, agent design patterns, tool design, context management, and caching strategies. Use this when starting a new Claude API project or when you need guidance on advanced SDK features.

features.name: /debug
features.summary_ja: デバッグログをセッション中に切り替え
features.description_ja: 現在のセッションのデバッグログをミッドセッションで切替（v2.1.30追加・v2.1.71更新）。デフォルトでは記録されないデバッグログをオンにしてトラブルシュートに使う。Claudeによるセッション診断にも対応。
features.summary_en: Toggle debug logging on or off mid-session without restarting to capture detailed diagnostic information for troubleshooting problems.
features.description_en: Toggles debug logging on or off during the current session without requiring a restart, added in v2.1.30 and updated in v2.1.71. Debug logs are not recorded by default. Enabling them captures detailed internal diagnostic information useful for troubleshooting unexpected behavior. Claude can also perform session diagnostics when debug mode is active.

features.name: /todos
features.summary_ja: 現在のTODOアイテム一覧を表示
features.description_ja: TodoWriteツールで記録された現在のセッションのTODOアイテムをオーバーレイで一覧表示（v1.0.94で追加）。pending/in_progress/completed の進捗状態を確認できる。
features.summary_en: Display an overlay panel listing all current session TODO items with their pending, in-progress, and completed progress states.
features.description_en: Shows an overlay that lists all TODO items recorded by the TodoWrite tool in the current session, added in v1.0.94. Each item displays its current progress state: pending, in-progress, or completed. Use this to get a quick view of remaining work and overall task progress during a complex multi-step session.

features.name: /recap
features.summary_ja: セッション再開時の作業コンテキストを要約
features.description_ja: セッションに戻った際に直前の作業内容のコンテキストを提供するリキャップ機能（v2.1.108追加）。/config で自動表示を設定でき、テレメトリ無効時は CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_AWAY_SUMMARY 環境変数で強制有効化可能。
features.summary_en: Show a concise summary of recent work context when returning to a session after an absence, added in v2.1.108.
features.description_en: Provides a concise recap of recent work context when you return to a session after stepping away, added in v2.1.108. Automatic display of the recap on session resume can be configured via /config. When telemetry is disabled, set the CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_AWAY_SUMMARY environment variable to force the recap feature on.

features.name: /less-permission-prompts
features.summary_ja: 許可プロンプト削減の allowlist を自動提案
features.description_ja: 過去のトランスクリプトをスキャンして読み取り専用のBash・MCPツール呼び出しパターンを検出し、`.claude/settings.json` の許可リストとして優先順に提案するスキル（v2.1.111で追加）。
features.summary_en: Scan past session transcripts to detect safe read-only patterns and suggest a prioritized allowlist to reduce repetitive permission prompts.
features.description_en: A skill added in v2.1.111 that scans past session transcripts to identify frequently approved read-only Bash and MCP tool call patterns. It then generates a prioritized allowlist for the .claude/settings.json file, reducing repetitive permission prompts for operations Claude already has your implicit approval to perform.

features.name: /setup-bedrock
features.summary_ja: Amazon Bedrock接続を対話形式でセットアップ
features.description_ja: Amazon Bedrock 経由でClaudeを利用するための設定を対話形式で実施（v2.1.111改善）。CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR 設定時は実際のパスを表示し、既存ピンからモデル候補を提案、対応モデルでは1Mコンテキストオプションも提示。/setup-vertex も同様。
features.summary_en: Interactively configure Claude access through Amazon Bedrock with guided model selection and optional 1M context token settings.
features.description_en: Interactively configures Claude access via Amazon Bedrock through a guided setup flow, improved in v2.1.111. When CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR is set, the actual config path is displayed instead of a generic placeholder. Model candidates are suggested from existing pins, and models that support 1M context windows offer that as an option during setup. The companion command /setup-vertex provides the same flow for Google Vertex AI.

features.name: /fast
features.summary_ja: Opus 4.6の高速応答モードを切り替え
features.description_ja: Claude Opus 4.6 ベースの高速応答モード（Fast Mode）をON/OFFする。サードパーティプロバイダーでは利用不可で「not available」と表示される。/extra-usage 有効化後は即座に使用可能になる（v2.1.37修正）。
features.summary_en: Toggle Fast Mode for Claude Opus 4.6 to get quicker, lower-latency responses when speed is the priority over depth.
features.description_en: Turns Fast Mode on or off for the Claude Opus 4.6 model, which provides quicker response generation at lower latency. Fast Mode is not available with third-party providers and displays a 'not available' message in those configurations. After enabling additional usage via /extra-usage, Fast Mode becomes available immediately (fixed in v2.1.37).

features.name: /focus
features.summary_ja: フルスクリーンTUIのフォーカスビューを切り替え
features.description_ja: フルスクリーンレンダラー（/tui fullscreen）でのフォーカスビューをON/OFFする（v2.1.110追加）。Ctrl+O はノーマル/詳細ビューの切替専用に変更され、フォーカスビューはこのコマンドで制御する。フルスクリーン無効時は有効化方法を案内。
features.summary_en: Toggle the focus view in the fullscreen TUI renderer, a feature added in v2.1.110 alongside a Ctrl+O key reassignment.
features.description_en: Toggles the focus view on or off in the fullscreen TUI renderer (/tui fullscreen), added in v2.1.110. The Ctrl+O shortcut was reassigned to toggle between normal and detail views, while this command now controls the focus view specifically. When the fullscreen renderer is not active, the command shows instructions for how to enable it first.

features.name: /team-onboarding
features.summary_ja: チームメンバー向けオンボーディングガイドを生成
features.description_ja: ローカルの Claude Code 使用履歴をもとに、チームメンバーのランプアップガイドを自動生成する（v2.1.101追加）。プロジェクト固有のコマンドパターンや慣習をまとめたドキュメントを作成し、新規参加者の立ち上がりを支援する。
features.summary_en: Auto-generate a team ramp-up guide from local Claude Code usage history to help new contributors get started quickly.
features.description_en: Automatically generates a ramp-up guide for new team members based on the local Claude Code usage history for the project, added in v2.1.101. The generated document captures project-specific command patterns and conventions derived from actual usage, making it a practical starting point for new contributors rather than a manually maintained wiki page.

features.name: /install-github-app
features.summary_ja: GitHub App連携をインストール
features.description_ja: Claude Code と GitHub を連携する GitHub App のインストールを対話形式で実施。エラーハンドリングが強化されており（v1.0.7改善）、Esc でダイアログを閉じられる（v2.1.136修正）。GitHub Actions 連携のセットアップに使う。
features.summary_en: Interactively install the Claude Code GitHub App to enable GitHub Actions integration and automated pull request responses.
features.description_en: Guides you interactively through installing the GitHub App that integrates Claude Code with GitHub, enabling automated responses to pull requests and GitHub Actions workflows. Error handling was improved in v1.0.7. Press Esc to close the dialog at any time (fixed in v2.1.136). Use this when setting up Claude Code in a new repository for GitHub Actions integration.

features.name: /simplify
features.summary_ja: 変更コードの品質・効率をレビューして修正
features.description_ja: v2.1.63で追加されたバンドル型スラッシュコマンド。変更されたコードを再利用性・品質・効率の観点でレビューし、検出した問題を修正する。コードレビューと実際のリファクタを一括で行う。
features.summary_en: Review recently changed code for reusability, quality, and efficiency, then automatically apply all detected fixes in a single pass.
features.description_en: A bundled slash command added in v2.1.63 that reviews recently changed code for reusability, quality, and efficiency. After identifying issues, it applies all detected fixes in a single automated pass. This combines what would otherwise be a two-step review-then-fix workflow into one command, making it efficient to clean up code immediately after making changes.

features.name: /goal
features.summary_ja: 完了条件を設定して複数ターンを自動実行
features.description_ja: 完了条件をClaudeに設定し、条件が満たされるまで複数ターンにわたって自動実行する（v2.1.139追加）。インタラクティブ・--print・Remote Control のすべてで動作。実行中は経過時間・ターン数・トークン数をオーバーレイパネルでリアルタイム表示。

examples.title: Run with completion condition
examples.code: /goal テストがすべて通るまで修正を続けて

features.summary_en: Set a completion condition and have Claude automatically iterate across multiple conversation turns until that condition is satisfied.
features.description_en: Sets a completion condition for Claude, which then automatically iterates through multiple turns until the condition is met, added in v2.1.139. Works in interactive mode, --print mode, and Remote Control sessions. A live overlay panel shows elapsed time, turn count, and token usage in real time while the goal is being pursued.

features.name: /scroll-speed
features.summary_ja: マウスホイールのスクロール速度を調整
features.description_ja: マウスホイールのスクロール速度をリアルタイムプレビュー付きで調整するコマンド（v2.1.139追加）。カーソルや VS Code でのスクロール速度問題にも対応しており、トラックパッドとマウスホイールのスクロール量を別々に制御できる。
features.summary_en: Adjust the mouse wheel scroll speed with a real-time live preview; trackpad and mouse wheel speeds are controlled independently.
features.description_en: Adjusts the mouse wheel scroll speed with a real-time preview so you can immediately see the effect before confirming, added in v2.1.139. Addresses scroll speed issues observed in Cursor and VS Code environments. Trackpad scroll amount and mouse wheel scroll amount are controlled as separate settings, so you can tune each input device independently.

features.name: /schedule
features.summary_ja: 定期スケジュールのリモートエージェントを管理
features.description_ja: cron スケジュールで定期実行するリモートエージェント（ルーティン）の作成・一覧・実行を管理する（v2.1.139）。claude.ai 認証が必要で、ANTHROPIC_API_KEY 設定時は Remote Control・claude.ai MCP コネクタと同様に無効化される。
features.summary_en: Create, list, and manage remote agents that run automatically on a cron schedule to automate recurring development tasks.
features.description_en: Manages remote agents — called routines — that execute automatically on a cron schedule, introduced in v2.1.139. Requires claude.ai authentication. When ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set, this feature is disabled in the same way as Remote Control and the claude.ai MCP connector. Use this to automate recurring development tasks without manual intervention.

features.name: /ultraplan
features.summary_ja: クラウドセッションで計画をリファイン
features.description_ja: プランモードから「Refine with Ultraplan」として起動できるクラウドベースの計画精緻化機能（v2.1.101追加）。デフォルトのクラウド環境を自動生成してリモートセッションURLをトランスクリプトに表示。組織またはAuth設定でクラウドに到達できない場合は非表示になる。
features.summary_en: Refine a complex plan in a dedicated cloud-based session, launched from plan mode via the 'Refine with Ultraplan' action.
features.description_en: A cloud-based plan refinement capability added in v2.1.101, accessible from plan mode via the 'Refine with Ultraplan' action. Automatically provisions a default cloud environment and displays the remote session URL in the transcript. Hidden when the organization or authentication configuration cannot reach the cloud environment.

features.name: /powerup
features.summary_ja: インタラクティブな機能チュートリアルを起動
features.description_ja: Claude Code の各機能をアニメーションデモ付きのインタラクティブなレッスン形式で学べる（v2.1.90追加）。ハンズオン形式で機能の使い方を習得できる。
features.summary_en: Launch interactive animated feature tutorials to learn Claude Code hands-on step by step, introduced in v2.1.90.
features.description_en: Starts interactive lessons that teach Claude Code features through animated demonstrations, added in v2.1.90. Each lesson is presented in a hands-on format so you can practice the feature as you learn it. Use this to get up to speed on features you have not tried yet or to explore capabilities you may have overlooked.

features.name: /teleport
features.summary_ja: リモートセッションを再開（claude.ai登録者向け）
features.description_ja: claude.ai 登録者向けのリモートセッション再開コマンド（v2.1.0追加）。/remote-env でリモートセッションを設定し、/teleport で再開する。Remote Control との組み合わせで利用可能。
features.summary_en: Resume a previously configured remote session for claude.ai subscribers; configure the target connection first with /remote-env.
features.description_en: A remote session resume command for claude.ai subscribers, added in v2.1.0. Before using this command, configure the remote session target with /remote-env. Once configured, /teleport resumes the specified remote session. Can be used together with Remote Control to hand off work between devices.

features.name: /remote-env
features.summary_ja: リモートセッション環境を設定（claude.ai登録者向け）
features.description_ja: claude.ai 登録者向けのリモートセッション設定コマンド（v2.1.0追加）。リモート環境のパラメータを設定し、/teleport でセッションを再開する際の接続先を定義する。
features.summary_en: Define remote session connection parameters for claude.ai subscribers to set the endpoint used when resuming with /teleport.
features.description_en: A remote session configuration command for claude.ai subscribers, added in v2.1.0. Defines the endpoint and parameters for the remote session that will be resumed with /teleport. Set the remote environment first, then use /teleport to connect to it. Designed for use alongside Remote Control for cross-device workflows.

features.name: /bg
features.summary_ja: バックグラウンドエージェントを起動
features.description_ja: バックグラウンドエージェントをコマンドまたはキーボードショートカット ←← で起動する。起動時に現在の権限モードを引き継ぐ（v2.1.141）。実行中のタスクは /tasks で確認可能。
features.summary_en: Launch a background agent that inherits the current permission mode; monitor its progress at any time with /tasks.
features.description_en: Launches a background agent via the /bg command or the ←← double-left-arrow keyboard shortcut. The background agent inherits the current session's permission mode at the time of launch (v2.1.141). Monitor active background tasks and view their status at any time using /tasks.

features.name: /setup-vertex
features.summary_ja: Google Vertex AI接続を対話形式でセットアップ
features.description_ja: Google Cloud Vertex AI 経由でClaudeを利用するための設定を対話形式で実施（v2.1.111改善）。CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR 設定時は実際のパスを表示し、既存ピンからモデル候補を提案、対応モデルでは1Mコンテキストオプションも提示。
features.summary_en: Interactively configure Claude access through Google Cloud Vertex AI with guided model selection and context token options.
features.description_en: Interactively configures Claude access via Google Cloud Vertex AI through a guided setup flow, improved in v2.1.111. When CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR is set, the actual config path is shown. Model candidates are suggested from existing pins, and models supporting 1M context windows offer that as an option during setup. The companion command /setup-bedrock provides the same guided flow for Amazon Bedrock.

features.name: /chrome
features.summary_ja: ブラウザをClaudeから直接操作（Beta）
features.description_ja: Claude in Chrome拡張機能（claude.ai/chrome）と連携し、ブラウザを直接Claude Codeから操作できるベータ機能（v2.0.72追加）。認証設定によっては非表示になる場合がある。
features.summary_en: Control your Chrome browser directly from Claude Code via the Claude in Chrome extension (Beta).
features.description_en: Integrates with the Claude in Chrome extension (claude.ai/chrome) to let you operate your browser directly from Claude Code, added as a beta feature in v2.0.72. This enables browser automation workflows without leaving the terminal. May be hidden depending on the current authentication configuration.

features.name: /commit-push-pr
features.summary_ja: コミット・プッシュ・PR作成を一括実行
features.description_ja: git commit・push・PR作成を一括実行するバンドルスキル。MCP経由でSlackが設定されている場合はPR URLを自動的にSlackチャンネルに投稿する（v2.1.20で変更）。
features.summary_en: Run git commit, push, and pull request creation in one bundled command, with optional Slack notification.
features.description_en: A bundled skill that executes git commit, push, and pull request creation in a single step. When Slack is configured via MCP, the PR URL is automatically posted to the configured Slack channel (behavior changed in v2.1.20). Use this to streamline the common end-of-task workflow of committing work and opening a PR for review.

features.name: /web-setup
features.summary_ja: GitHub App Web接続をセットアップ
features.description_ja: Claude Code とGitHub AppのWeb接続を設定するダイアログ（v2.1.136追加）。既存の接続を上書きする前に警告を表示する（v2.1.142）。Escキーでダイアログを閉じられる。
features.summary_en: Configure the GitHub App Web connection for Claude Code through an interactive guided setup dialog, with overwrite protection added in v2.1.142.
features.description_en: Opens an interactive dialog to set up the Web connection between Claude Code and the GitHub App, added in v2.1.136. Displays a warning before overwriting an existing connection (v2.1.142). Press Esc to close the dialog without making changes. Use this when setting up or reconfiguring the GitHub App web integration.

features.name: /update
features.summary_ja: Claude Codeをセッション内から最新版に更新
features.description_ja: セッション内から Claude Code を最新バージョンに更新するコマンド。`claude update` CLI サブコマンドと同等の更新を対話セッションから実行可能。worktree 内セッションでも動作（v2.1.116 修正）。`DISABLE_UPDATES` 環境変数で全更新パスを無効化可能。
features.summary_en: Update Claude Code to the latest version from within an active interactive session without restarting first.
features.description_en: Updates Claude Code to the latest version from within an active interactive session, equivalent to running the `claude update` CLI subcommand. Works inside worktree sessions as well (fixed in v2.1.116). Set the DISABLE_UPDATES environment variable to disable all update paths, including this command, for managed deployments that control updates externally.

features.name: /fork
features.summary_ja: /branch の旧コマンド名（エイリアス）
features.description_ja: v2.1.77 で `/branch` にリネームされた旧コマンド名。エイリアスとして引き続き動作し、セッションをフォークして別の方向を試すことができる。分岐したセッションは /resume で再開可能。新しい記法では `/branch` を使用することを推奨。
features.summary_en: Legacy alias for /branch that forks the current session, letting you explore an alternative direction and resume it later with /resume.
features.description_en: /fork is the original name for the session-branching command renamed to /branch in v2.1.77. It continues to work as an alias: it creates a fork of the active conversation so you can explore a different approach or interpretation without abandoning the original thread. The forked session is saved and can be resumed at any time with /resume. While /fork remains functional for backward compatibility, /branch is now the canonical command and should be preferred in all new usage. Handy for speculative refactors, testing alternative solutions, or experimenting without committing to a direction.

features.name: Bash
features.summary_ja: シェルコマンドを実行
features.description_ja: シェル環境でコマンドを実行。npm install、git操作、ビルドコマンドなどに使う。最大10分のタイムアウト指定可能。
features.summary_en: Execute shell commands including package installs, git operations, and build scripts, with a configurable timeout up to 10 minutes.
features.description_en: Executes arbitrary commands in the shell environment with full access to the terminal. Use this for npm install, git operations, build commands, test runners, and any other shell interaction. A timeout can be specified up to a maximum of ten minutes for long-running processes. The shell state does not persist between separate Bash tool calls.

features.name: Read
features.summary_ja: ファイルを読み取り
features.description_ja: ファイルの内容を読み取る。テキスト、PDF、画像、Jupyter notebookに対応。行番号付き、オフセット指定可能。
features.summary_en: Read file contents with line numbers and optional offset and limit; supports text files, PDFs, images, and Jupyter notebooks.
features.description_en: Reads the contents of a file and returns them with line numbers prepended to each line for easy reference. Supports text files, PDFs, images (displayed visually), and Jupyter notebooks. Use the offset and limit parameters to read only a specific portion of a large file rather than fetching the entire content at once.

features.name: Write
features.summary_ja: 新規ファイルを作成
features.description_ja: ローカルファイルシステムにファイルを作成・上書き。既存ファイルは事前に Read 必須。

examples.title: Create new file
examples.code: Write: 新ファイルを書き出す

features.summary_en: Create a new file or completely overwrite an existing one; a prior Read is required if the target file already exists.
features.description_en: Creates a new file or completely overwrites an existing file in the local filesystem with the provided content. When overwriting an existing file, a prior Read of that file is required to confirm awareness of its contents. For targeted changes to existing files, prefer the Edit or MultiEdit tools, which transmit only the diff rather than rewriting the entire file.

features.name: Edit
features.summary_ja: 既存ファイルを部分編集
features.description_ja: old_string と new_string を指定して文字列置換。差分のみ送信できるので Write より効率的。
features.summary_en: Perform a targeted string replacement in an existing file, transmitting only the diff for efficiency over the full file.
features.description_en: Performs a precise targeted string replacement in a file using old_string and new_string parameters. Only the diff is transmitted, making it significantly more efficient than rewriting the entire file with Write. The old_string must match exactly and must be unique within the file to ensure the correct location is edited. For multiple edits to the same file, use MultiEdit.

features.name: MultiEdit
features.summary_ja: 1ファイルに複数編集を一括適用
features.description_ja: 複数の Edit 操作を同時にトランザクションで適用。1つでも失敗すると全てロールバック。
features.summary_en: Apply multiple targeted Edit operations to a single file atomically; all changes roll back if any individual edit fails.
features.description_en: Applies multiple Edit operations to a single file in a single atomic transaction. If any one edit in the batch fails — for example due to a non-unique match string — all edits in the batch are rolled back, leaving the file unchanged. Use this when making several related changes to the same file to reduce round trips and ensure consistency.

features.name: Glob
features.summary_ja: パターンでファイル検索
features.description_ja: ワイルドカードパターン（src/**/*.ts等）でファイルを高速検索。
features.summary_en: Search for files matching a wildcard glob pattern such as src/**/*.ts quickly and efficiently across the entire workspace.
features.description_en: Performs fast file discovery using wildcard glob patterns such as src/**/*.ts, **/*.test.js, or **/config.*. Returns a list of matching file paths sorted by modification time. Use this when you need to find files by name pattern before reading or editing them, especially in large codebases with many directories.

features.name: Grep
features.summary_ja: ファイル内容を全文検索
features.description_ja: ripgrepベースの高速検索。正規表現対応、コンテキスト行表示、ファイル種別フィルタなど多機能。
features.summary_en: Perform full-text search with ripgrep, supporting regex patterns, context line display, and file type filters for fast results.
features.description_en: Provides high-speed full-text search across the codebase using ripgrep as the underlying engine. Supports regular expressions, optional context lines around each match, and file type filters to narrow the search to specific languages or extensions. Use this to find function definitions, variable usages, import statements, or any specific code pattern.

features.name: Task (Agent)
features.summary_ja: サブエージェントを起動
features.description_ja: 別のエージェントを起動して並列タスク実行。Explore/Plan/general-purpose 等の組み込みエージェントを使える。
features.summary_en: Launch a sub-agent in an isolated parallel execution context using types like Explore, Plan, or general-purpose.
features.description_en: Launches a separate agent to execute a task in parallel with the main session. Built-in agent types include Explore (read-only code search), Plan (implementation strategy design), and general-purpose (versatile multi-step work). Each agent runs in its own isolated context so it does not consume the main session's context window.

features.name: WebSearch
features.summary_ja: Webを検索
features.description_ja: 最新情報を検索。日付・ドメインフィルタ対応。米国限定。
features.summary_en: Search the web for current information beyond Claude's training cutoff using date and domain filters; US-only at this time.
features.description_en: Searches the web for information beyond Claude's training cutoff date, providing access to current events, the latest documentation, and recently released libraries. Supports date range filters and domain-specific searches to narrow results. Currently available for US-based queries only.

features.name: WebFetch
features.summary_ja: URLを取得して要約
features.description_ja: 指定URLからHTML取得→マークダウン変換→AIが要約。15分キャッシュあり。
features.summary_en: Fetch a URL, convert its HTML to Markdown, and return an AI-generated summary; responses are cached for 15 minutes.
features.description_en: Fetches the HTML content from a specified URL, converts it to clean Markdown for readability, and returns an AI-generated summary of the page content. Responses are cached for 15 minutes to avoid redundant network requests when the same URL is accessed multiple times in a session. Use this to read documentation pages, blog posts, or API references.

features.name: NotebookEdit
features.summary_ja: Jupyter Notebookセルを編集
features.description_ja: .ipynb ファイルの特定セルを編集・追加・削除。データサイエンス作業向け。
features.summary_en: Edit, add, or delete individual cells in a Jupyter Notebook .ipynb file while preserving the full notebook structure.
features.description_en: Edits, adds, or deletes specific cells in a .ipynb Jupyter Notebook file. Designed for data science and machine learning workflows where modifying individual cells without disrupting the notebook structure is important. Specify the cell index and the new source content, or use the delete action to remove a cell entirely.

features.name: TodoWrite
features.summary_ja: タスクリストで進捗管理
features.description_ja: 現在のセッション内のタスク追跡。pending/in_progress/completed の3状態。複雑な作業の整理に。

examples.title: Add task
examples.code: TodoWrite: 認証実装、テスト追加

features.summary_en: Create and manage a session task list with pending, in-progress, and completed states to track complex multi-step work.
features.description_en: Creates and manages a structured task list within the current session using three progress states: pending, in-progress, and completed. Use this to break complex multi-step tasks into trackable items and maintain a clear record of what has been done and what remains. The /todos command shows the current list in an overlay at any time.

features.name: SlashCommand
features.summary_ja: 別のスラッシュコマンドを実行
features.description_ja: Claude が他のスラッシュコマンドを呼び出す内部ツール。コマンド連携の基盤。
features.summary_en: An internal tool that lets Claude programmatically invoke other slash commands during automated skill and agent execution.
features.description_en: An internal tool that allows Claude to programmatically call other slash commands as part of automated skill or agent workflows. It serves as the foundation for skill and command composition, enabling one skill to trigger another as part of a multi-step pipeline. You do not invoke this tool directly; Claude uses it internally.

features.name: PreToolUse Hook
features.summary_ja: ツール実行前のフック
features.description_ja: ツール実行直前に走るフック。matcher で対象ツール指定、危険コマンドのブロックや事前検証に使える。
features.summary_en: Run a configured shell script immediately before a specific tool executes to validate, log, or block the invocation.
features.description_en: Runs a configured shell script just before a tool is executed. Use the matcher field to target specific tools such as Bash or Edit. The hook can inspect the tool input and return a non-zero exit code to block the tool call, making this the right place to enforce safety rules like preventing dangerous shell commands from running.

features.name: PostToolUse Hook
features.summary_ja: ツール実行後のフック
features.description_ja: ツール実行直後に走るフック。ログ記録、自動フォーマット、テスト実行などに使う。
features.summary_en: Run a configured shell script immediately after a specific tool executes for automatic code formatting, testing, or logging.
features.description_en: Runs a configured shell script immediately after a tool finishes executing. Use the matcher field to target specific tools such as Edit or Write. Common use cases include running a code formatter automatically after every file edit, executing the test suite after code changes, or logging tool call results to an external system.

features.name: Stop Hook
features.summary_ja: Claude応答完了時のフック
features.description_ja: Claudeの応答が終了したときに走るフック。完了通知やセッションログ出力に。
features.summary_en: Run a configured shell script each time Claude finishes generating a response, for completion notifications and session logging.
features.description_en: Runs a configured hook script each time Claude finishes generating a response and stops producing output. Use this for desktop completion notifications, writing session summaries to a log file, or triggering any action that should happen every time Claude finishes a turn. The hook runs after each complete response, not just at session end.

features.name: SubagentStop Hook
features.summary_ja: サブエージェント完了時のフック
features.description_ja: サブエージェント（Task tool）が完了したときに走るフック。
features.summary_en: Run a shell script when a Task-tool sub-agent completes its work, for logging results or triggering downstream processes.
features.description_en: Runs a configured hook script when a sub-agent launched via the Task tool completes its execution and returns a result. Use this to log sub-agent results to a file, send a notification when a parallel task finishes, or chain downstream actions after a sub-agent's work is done.

features.name: SessionStart Hook
features.summary_ja: セッション開始時のフック
features.description_ja: Claude Code セッション開始時に走るフック。git pull や初期メッセージ表示に。
features.summary_en: Run a configured shell script each time a Claude Code session starts, such as running git pull or displaying a greeting.
features.description_en: Runs a configured hook script each time a new Claude Code session is created and starts. Common use cases include running git pull to ensure the repository is up to date, displaying a project status summary, or injecting environment-specific configuration. The hook fires once at the start of each session.

features.name: SessionEnd Hook
features.summary_ja: セッション終了時のフック
features.description_ja: セッション終了時に走るフック。コミット忘れ警告、サマリー出力など。
features.summary_en: Run a configured shell script each time a session ends, such as checking uncommitted changes or writing a session summary.
features.description_en: Runs a configured hook script each time a Claude Code session ends. Common use cases include checking for uncommitted changes and displaying a warning, writing a summary of the session's work to a log file, or running cleanup tasks that should happen at the end of every working session.

features.name: UserPromptSubmit Hook
features.summary_ja: ユーザー入力送信時のフック
features.description_ja: ユーザーがプロンプトを送信した直後に走る。入力内容を加工・追記したり、追加コンテキスト注入に使える。

examples.title: Auto-append translation instruction
examples.code: UserPromptSubmit: 日本語入力に英訳ヒント追加

features.summary_en: Run a shell script when the user submits a prompt to transform the input or automatically inject additional runtime context.
features.description_en: Runs a configured hook script immediately after the user submits a prompt and before Claude begins processing it. The hook can modify the prompt content, append additional context, or inject runtime information such as the current date or environment state. Use this to automatically add standing instructions to every prompt without typing them manually.

features.name: PreCompact Hook
features.summary_ja: コンテキスト圧縮直前のフック
features.description_ja: コンテキスト圧縮が走る直前に呼ばれる。圧縮前に重要な情報を保存したい時に。
features.summary_en: Run a shell script just before context compression to preserve critical session state before it is summarized and compacted.
features.description_en: Runs a configured hook script just before context compression is triggered — either manually via /compact or automatically when the context window fills up. Use this to snapshot important session state, write a checkpoint to a file, or extract and save information that might be lost or summarized away during compression.

features.name: Notification Hook
features.summary_ja: 通知イベントのフック
features.description_ja: Claudeが通知を出すタイミング（権限要求等）で走るフック。デスクトップ通知連携などに。
features.summary_en: Run a shell script when Claude emits a notification event such as a permission request, rate limit, or task completion.
features.description_en: Runs a configured hook script when Claude emits a notification event, such as requesting user permission to execute a tool, hitting a rate limit, or completing a long-running background task. Use this to forward notifications to a desktop notification system so you are alerted even when not actively watching the terminal.

features.name: Plan Mode
features.summary_ja: 読み取り専用の計画モード
features.description_ja: Shift+Tabで切替。コードを書かずに「これからやること」を提案するだけ。実装前のレビューに最適。
features.summary_en: A read-only planning mode where Claude outlines what it would do without making any changes; toggle it with Shift+Tab.
features.description_en: Toggle with Shift+Tab to enter a read-only planning mode where Claude only proposes the steps it would take and the changes it would make, without actually writing any code or modifying any files. Use this to review and validate the proposed approach before committing to implementation. Particularly useful for complex refactors or changes that touch many files.

features.name: Permission Modes
features.summary_ja: ツール実行時の確認制御
features.description_ja: default(都度確認)、acceptEdits(編集自動)、bypassPermissions(全自動)、plan(読取のみ)の4モード。
features.summary_en: Select from four tool confirmation modes — default, acceptEdits, bypassPermissions, or plan — to balance safety and productivity.
features.description_en: Four modes control how Claude handles tool execution confirmation: default requires explicit confirmation for most tool calls; acceptEdits automatically approves file edit operations while still prompting for shell commands; bypassPermissions skips all confirmations for fully automated workflows; and plan is a read-only mode where no changes can be made. Choose the mode that matches your current task's risk tolerance.

features.name: Output Styles
features.summary_ja: 応答スタイルのカスタマイズ
features.description_ja: Claudeの応答口調・形式を調整。簡潔モード、教育モードなどプリセットあり。
features.summary_en: Customize Claude's response tone and format using built-in presets such as concise mode or educational mode for different needs.
features.description_en: Adjusts Claude's response tone, verbosity, and format to match your working style. Available presets include concise mode for brief answers, educational mode for step-by-step explanations, and others. These act as persistent style modifiers applied to all responses in the session until changed.

features.name: Headless Mode (--print)
features.summary_ja: 対話なしで一発実行
features.description_ja: --print フラグで対話UIなしに1回だけプロンプトを実行して結果を返す。CIやスクリプト統合に。
features.summary_en: Run a single prompt non-interactively with --print and print the result to stdout for use in CI pipelines and scripts.
features.description_en: The --print flag runs a single prompt without launching the interactive TUI and outputs the result directly to stdout. This headless mode is ideal for CI pipelines, shell script integration, and any workflow where you need programmatic access to Claude's output. Combine with --model to specify the model and with shell redirects to capture the output.

features.name: CLAUDE.md
features.summary_ja: プロジェクトガイダンスファイル
features.description_ja: リポジトリ直下に置くと Claude が自動的に読み込むプロジェクトガイダンス。コーディング規約、ディレクトリ構造、注意事項などを書く。
features.summary_en: A project guidance file placed at the repository root that Claude automatically reads at every session start as standing instructions.
features.description_en: Place this file at the repository root and Claude will automatically read it at the start of every session, treating its contents as standing instructions. Use it to document coding conventions, directory structure, important commands, and anything else Claude should always know about the project. Generate a starter template with /init and customize it for your team.

features.name: AGENTS.md
features.summary_ja: エージェント定義ファイル
features.description_ja: サブエージェントの挙動を定義。CLAUDE.md と並列で機能する場合あり。

examples.title: Place file
examples.code: プロジェクトルートに配置

features.summary_en: A project-level file that defines default sub-agent behavior and tool access, functioning alongside CLAUDE.md in compatible configurations.
features.description_en: Defines the default behavior, tool access, and behavioral constraints for sub-agents launched within the project. In configurations where both CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md are present, they function in parallel with each other. Use this to set project-wide defaults for how sub-agents should operate, separate from the main session guidance in CLAUDE.md.

features.name: ONBOARDING.md
features.summary_ja: 新規参加者向けガイド
features.description_ja: プロジェクトに初めて触れる人のためのオンボーディング情報。Claude が読み込んでアシストに使う。

examples.title: Place file
examples.code: プロジェクトルートに配置

features.summary_en: An onboarding guide for new project contributors that Claude reads automatically and uses to proactively assist new team members.
features.description_en: Contains onboarding information tailored specifically for people who are new to the project. Claude reads this file automatically and uses its contents to proactively assist contributors who are getting started. Include environment setup steps, key architecture concepts, important conventions, and links to relevant resources.

features.name: settings.json
features.summary_ja: ユーザー全体の設定ファイル
features.description_ja: ~/.claude/settings.json でグローバル設定。テーマ、フック、許可リスト、環境変数など。
features.summary_en: The global user settings file at ~/.claude/settings.json covering themes, hooks, permission allowlists, and environment variable definitions.
features.description_en: The global configuration file located at ~/.claude/settings.json. Contains user-level settings covering the active theme, hook definitions, tool permission allowlists, and environment variable declarations. Changes to this file apply across all Claude Code sessions. Use /config for an interactive interface instead of editing the JSON directly.

features.name: settings.local.json
features.summary_ja: プロジェクト固有設定
features.description_ja: .claude/settings.local.json でプロジェクト単位設定。git管理外、個人の許可設定などに。
features.summary_en: A project-specific settings file at .claude/settings.local.json that is excluded from version control for personal configuration overrides.
features.description_en: Project-level configuration stored in .claude/settings.local.json that is automatically excluded from version control. Use this for personal permission overrides and project-specific settings that should not be shared with the rest of the team. Settings in this file take precedence over the global settings.json for the current project.

features.name: .mcp.json
features.summary_ja: MCPサーバー設定ファイル
features.description_ja: プロジェクトに紐づく MCP サーバーを定義。stdio/SSE/HTTP の各種MCPサーバーを登録できる。
features.summary_en: The project-level MCP server configuration file at .mcp.json for registering stdio, SSE, and HTTP transport server connections.
features.description_en: Defines the MCP servers associated with the project in a .mcp.json file at the project root. Supports all three MCP transport types: stdio (local process), SSE (HTTP streaming), and HTTP (standard request-response). This file is typically committed to the repository so all team members share the same MCP server configuration.

features.name: Memory System
features.summary_ja: 永続メモリシステム
features.description_ja: ~/.claude/projects/<hash>/memory/ にユーザー嗜好・プロジェクト情報を蓄積。MEMORY.md がインデックス。
features.summary_en: The persistent cross-session memory store located at ~/.claude/projects/<hash>/memory/, using MEMORY.md as its directory index file.
features.description_en: Stores user preferences and accumulated project knowledge persistently across sessions in the ~/.claude/projects/<hash>/memory/ directory. The MEMORY.md file serves as the index for the memory store. Claude references these memories automatically in future interactions to maintain continuity. Use /memory to view and manage what has been stored.

features.name: @-mentions
features.summary_ja: ファイルを@で参照
features.description_ja: プロンプト内で @path/to/file と書くと、そのファイルが自動的にコンテキストに追加される。
features.summary_en: Reference any file by typing @path/to/file in a prompt to automatically add the file's full contents to the context.
features.description_en: Typing @path/to/file in a prompt automatically adds the complete contents of that file to the conversation context. This makes it easy to ask questions about specific files without copying and pasting their contents. Supports both relative and absolute paths. Tab completion is available in some terminal environments.

features.name: --continue (-c)
features.summary_ja: 前回のセッションを継続
features.description_ja: claude --continue で直前のセッションをそのまま再開。コンテキストを失わずに続けられる。
features.summary_en: Resume the most recent session immediately with --continue or -c, restoring all conversation history and context without a picker.
features.description_en: Running claude --continue or claude -c resumes the most recently active session exactly where it left off, without presenting a session picker. All conversation history and context are restored. Use this when you close the terminal accidentally or when you always want to pick up from the last session without being prompted to choose.

features.name: --resume (-r)
features.summary_ja: 特定セッションを再開
features.description_ja: claude --resume <session-id> で過去の任意セッションを再開。
features.summary_en: Resume any specific past session by its ID with --resume (-r), or open an interactive picker to select from all sessions.
features.description_en: Running claude --resume <session-id> resumes a specific past session using its unique identifier. Running claude --resume without an ID opens an interactive session picker that lists all past sessions so you can select one. Use this to return to an older session that is not the most recent one.

features.name: --print (-p)
features.summary_ja: ヘッドレスモードで一発実行
features.description_ja: 対話UIを起動せずプロンプトを実行して結果を出力。スクリプト連携に。
features.summary_en: Execute a single prompt non-interactively with --print (-p) and output the result to stdout for shell scripting and CI.
features.description_en: Runs a single prompt without launching the interactive TUI and prints the result to standard output, making it composable with shell pipes and redirects. Use --print (-p) to integrate Claude into shell scripts, CI pipelines, or any automated workflow that needs Claude's output as text. Combine with --model to specify which model to use.

features.name: --model
features.summary_ja: 使用モデルを起動時に指定
features.description_ja: claude --model claude-opus-4-7 のように、起動時に使用モデルを固定。
features.summary_en: Pin the AI model to use at launch time with --model to ensure a specific Claude version is used for the entire session.
features.description_en: Specifies the Claude model to use when launching a new session, for example claude --model claude-opus-4-7. The specified model is used for the entire session. Use this when you need a particular model version for reproducibility or when you want to override the default model configured in settings.json.

features.name: --add-dir
features.summary_ja: 追加の作業ディレクトリを指定
features.description_ja: Claude のアクセスを通常のcwd以外にも広げる。複数リポジトリを横断する作業に。
features.summary_en: Extend Claude's file access to additional directories at session launch with --add-dir for cross-repo and monorepo work.
features.description_en: Extends Claude's file access at session launch to include one or more additional directories beyond the current working directory. Useful for monorepos, projects that span multiple repositories, or any situation where the files you need are not all under a single root directory. Multiple --add-dir flags can be combined.

features.name: Subagent System
features.summary_ja: サブエージェントの仕組み
features.description_ja: メインのClaudeとは別の文脈で動く専門エージェント。Task tool 経由で起動。複雑タスクの並列処理や文脈分離に。
features.summary_en: The sub-agent system launches specialized agents in isolated contexts for parallel task execution or context-separated delegated work.
features.description_en: Sub-agents are specialized agents that run in execution contexts fully separate from the main Claude session. Launch them with the Task tool to execute work in parallel without consuming the main session's context window. Common patterns include delegating research tasks to an Explore agent while the main session continues planning, or running multiple investigation tasks simultaneously.

features.name: Explore Agent
features.summary_ja: 高速読み取り検索エージェント
features.description_ja: コードを探すための読み取り専用検索エージェント。パターン・キーワード・シンボル検索に最適。並列実行で本体の文脈を消費しない。
features.summary_en: A read-only search sub-agent optimized for fast pattern, keyword, and symbol discovery without consuming the main session context.
features.description_en: A read-only agent optimized specifically for searching and discovering code across the repository. Best used for pattern searches, keyword lookups, and symbol discovery tasks. Runs in parallel with the main session without consuming its context window, making it efficient for broad codebase exploration before focused editing begins.

features.name: Plan Agent
features.summary_ja: 実装計画を設計するエージェント
features.description_ja: タスクの実装戦略を設計。ステップバイステップ計画、重要ファイル特定、アーキテクチャトレードオフ考慮。

examples.title: Plan a new feature
examples.code: Task: subagent_type=Plan で認証機能の実装計画

features.summary_en: A specialized planning sub-agent that designs step-by-step implementation strategies, identifies critical files, and considers architectural tradeoffs.
features.description_en: Designs detailed implementation strategies for complex development tasks. Produces step-by-step execution plans, identifies the critical files and modules involved, and considers architectural tradeoffs.
